title: Sonic Deflect
description: Adds an enchantment that allows you to deflect the Warden's sonic beam to deal damage to other entities
body:
This mod adds an enchantment that allows you to deflect the Warden's sonic beam to deal damage to other entities, including the warden.


### Features

- A new enchantment called Sonic Deflect (max 3 levels) that can be found in ancient cities and other dungeons
- When a chestplate has this enchantment, it will redirect any sonic beams the Warden casts on you into the direction you are looking
- The beam you redirect can damage entities, including the Warden that cast it
- The damage you deal with the reflected beam scales linearly based on the distance from the entity - the closer you are, the more damage you will deal
 
 ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/453/124/2022-04-16_01.png)
 ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/453/125/2022-04-16_01.png)
 ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/453/126/2022-04-16_01.png)

### Where to find this enchantment?

This enchantment can be found in pretty much all places other enchantments can be found, including dungeons and ancient cities.

 

### What piece of armor does this enchantment apply to?

This enchantment applies to the Chestplate

 

### What is the maximum level of this enchantment?

The maximum level of this enchantment is 3

 

### Issues & Feedback

Have an issue with the mod? Got some feedback? Or do you simply want to be updated on my mods? [Join my Discord server!](https://discord.gg/WtdP245E8Q)
